query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS grant_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  application_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_type ENUM('narrative', 'budget', 'timeline', 'letters_of_support', 'financials', 'tax_exempt', 'board_list', 'org_chart', 'resumes', 'other') DEFAULT 'other',
  document_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_url VARCHAR(500),
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'complete', 'needs_revision') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  due_date DATE,
  assigned_to VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES grant_applications(id)
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  application_id INT NOT NULL,
  document_type ENUM('narrative', 'budget', 'timeline', 'letters_of_support', 'financials', 'tax_exempt', 'board_list', 'org_chart', 'resumes', 'other') DEFAULT 'other',
  document_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_url VARCHAR(500),
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'complete', 'needs_revision') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  due_date DATE,
  assigned_to VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (application_id) REFERENCES grant_applications(id)
);
